mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_board_like.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO board_like ( like_id, member_id, target_type, target_id ) VALUES ( #{likeId}, #{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId} )
mapper.select: SELECT like_id, member_id, target_type, target_id FROM board_like WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY like_id DESC
